## What needs changing?

- [ ] README
- [ ] Inline CLI help (`npm-sentinel help`)
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING / SECURITY / other markdown
- [ ] Comments in code (minor)

## Current vs desired

Where is the doc (section or file), and what should it say instead?

## Why it matters

Who is confused, and what mistake does this prevent?
